installDesc: Add to your home screen for quick access
helpSubtitle: Understand how ThinkCards works and how to get the most out of it.
helpFsrsDesc: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) is an algorithm that calculates the ideal time to review each card based on your memory performance. It adapts over time — cards you master well receive increasingly longer intervals, while cards you struggle with come back sooner to reinforce learning.
helpRatingAgainDesc: You didn't remember. The card comes back soon to reinforce.
helpRatingHardDesc: You remembered with difficulty. Short interval.
helpRatingGoodDesc: You remembered with moderate effort. Ideal interval.
helpRatingEasyDesc: You remembered perfectly. Interval grows a lot.
helpTip1: One concept per card — avoid putting multiple pieces of information in a single card.
helpTip2: Prefer direct questions — "What is X?" instead of "Talk about X".
helpTip3: Use context — adding examples in the answer helps retention.
helpTip4: Short cards are reviewed faster and retained longer.
helpCardTypeBasicDesc: Simple front and back. You see the question, think of the answer, reveal it, and rate.
helpCardTypeClozeDesc: Fill in the blank. Use {{c1::answer}} in the text.
helpCardTypeTypingDesc: You type the answer before revealing it. Ideal for memorizing exact terms.

statsSubtitle: Your study activity and progress overview
welcomeHeroDesc: ThinkCards uses the FSRS algorithm to schedule each review at the right moment. You study less and retain more.
welcomeHeroCardQuestion: What is the function of the mitochondria?
welcomeHowItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to effective long-term learning.
welcomeStep01Desc: Organize your flashcards into decks and subdecks by topic.
welcomeStep02Desc: The algorithm schedules each card at the right moment for retention.
welcomeStep03Desc: Review less, remember more. Progress builds up every session.
welcomeFeaturesSubtitle: Everything you need to study efficiently, nothing you don't.
welcomeFeatureFsrsDesc: A modern open-source algorithm that adapts to your memory patterns. Each card gets its own schedule based on how well you know it.
welcomeFeatureSrsDesc: Cards show up right before you'd forget them. Short gaps for new material, longer ones as you get comfortable.
welcomeFeatureStatsDesc: Streak, study time, card distribution and daily progress. Everything you need to stay on track.
welcomeFeatureDecksDesc: Organize cards into nested decks by subject, chapter or any structure that works for you.
welcomeFeatureOfflineDesc: Study anywhere, even without internet. Your data syncs automatically when you're back online.
welcomeFeaturePwaDesc: Install as a PWA on desktop or mobile. No app store needed, always up to date.
welcomeWhyFsrsDesc1: FSRS is a modern open-source algorithm that models how memory works. Unlike fixed-interval systems, it tracks the difficulty and stability of each card and adjusts review timing based on your actual performance.
welcomeWhyFsrsDesc2: You spend less time on cards you already know and more time on the ones that need attention.
welcomeCompareDesc: FSRS achieves higher retention with fewer reviews than traditional methods.
welcomeCtaDesc: Free to use. No credit card required. Works on any device.
notFoundDesc: This page doesn't exist or was moved.
privacySection1Body: ThinkCards is a spaced-repetition flashcard application. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our service.
privacySection2Intro: We collect only what is necessary to provide the service:
privacySection2ItemAccountDesc: your email address and, optionally, a display name and profile picture.
privacySection2ItemContentDesc: decks, flashcards, and study history stored locally and optionally synced to our servers.
privacySection2ItemUsageDesc: study session statistics (cards reviewed, time spent) used to compute your streak and progress.
privacySection2Note: We do not collect payment data, precise location, or any information beyond what is listed above.
privacySection3Intro: Your data is used solely to:
privacySection3ItemAuth: Authenticate you and keep your session secure.
privacySection3ItemSync: Sync your decks and cards across devices.
privacySection3ItemStats: Display your study statistics within the app.
privacySection3Note: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing or advertising purposes.
privacySection4Body: Your data is stored using Supabase, which is hosted on infrastructure that complies with SOC 2 Type II. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Flashcard content is also stored locally in your browser using IndexedDB for offline access.
privacySection5Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the following rights:
privacySection5ItemAccessDesc: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacySection5ItemCorrectionDesc: update your username and email directly in Settings.
privacySection5ItemDeletionDesc: delete your account and all associated data permanently via Settings → Account → Delete account. This action is irreversible.
privacySection5ItemPortabilityDesc: your content is stored in standard formats (JSON/text) and can be exported on request.
privacySection5ItemCcpaDesc: we do not sell personal information. You have the right to know what data we collect and to request its deletion.
privacySection6Body: We use browser local storage and IndexedDB to store your flashcard data and preferences locally. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.
privacySection7Body: ThinkCards is not directed at children under 13 (or 16 in the EU). We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe a minor has created an account, please contact us so we can remove their data.
privacySection8Body: We may update this policy occasionally. When we do, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
privacySection9Body: For any privacy-related requests or questions, please contact us at
